activation_gate: Deferred. Activate only after the current ComfyUI foundation, Wave70 Mask Factory, Waves71-76 base physics/deformation layers, runtime lanes, cost controls, and strict QA gates are stable enough that this expansion will not derail nearer project milestones. Activation requires an explicit source-cited project decision.

external_references.usage: Production self-hosted LLM/VLM and heavy adapter execution target; use with explicit runtime windows and cost controls.

external_references.name: vLLM model serving
external_references.usage: Candidate high-throughput self-hosted inference server for supervisor, code, and multimodal models.

external_references.usage: Candidate self-hosted visual review model family for overlays, frame grids, maps, and generated artifacts.

external_references.name: Blender command line
external_references.usage: Primary autonomous production fitting, rigging, map baking, support-surface, and overlay backend.

external_references.name: SideFX Houdini batch workflow
external_references.usage: Advanced procedural, Vellum, SDF, pressure, contact, and tissue simulation backend.

external_references.name: Unreal Python automation
external_references.usage: Realtime proof, Control Rig, Chaos, Deformer Graph, ML Deformer, and render-pass automation backend.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer Python API
external_references.usage: Garment, blanket, sheet, fabric tension, cloth stretch, and cloth/body collision backend.

external_references.name: Substance Automation Toolkit
external_references.usage: Batch material, normal, roughness, displacement, curvature, AO, pressure, wrinkle, fabric, and tension map baking.

external_references.name: Maya command line and Python
external_references.usage: Production rigging, skinning, blendshape, pose-space deformation, muscle, Bifrost, and validation backend.

external_references.name: Cascadeur Python scripting

external_references.name: ZBrush ZScript
external_references.usage: Offline/source asset creation for universal base sculpt, alphas, pores, wrinkles, displacement, and corrective sculpt references.

purpose: Convert a registered neutral DAZ prototype and fitted production mesh into per-region tissue classes, mass, stiffness, damping, elasticity, sag, jiggle, compression, collision, and confidence evidence.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: daz_prototype_metadata_intake is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, metadata intake report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence daz_prototype_metadata_intake. It must support neutral A/T-pose DAZ export metadata, source files, textures, measurements, and optional prototype creation recipe as provenance only, never as runtime deformation authority, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: neutral A/T-pose DAZ export metadata, source files, textures, measurements, and optional prototype creation recipe as provenance only, never as runtime deformation authority. Required output: metadata intake report.
requirements.title: Read DAZ prototype metadata as provenance only

requirements.acceptance_criteria: regional_volume_delta_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, volume delta report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence regional_volume_delta_solver. It must support per-region volume/circumference deltas against neutral universal production base and registered body archetypes, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: per-region volume/circumference deltas against neutral universal production base and registered body archetypes. Required output: volume delta report.
requirements.title: Compute regional volume deltas

requirements.acceptance_criteria: surface_shape_feature_extractor is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, surface feature maps, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence surface_shape_feature_extractor. It must support fat rolls, folds, overhangs, cellulite-like surface variation, compression dents, sag contours, muscle definition, sharp cuts, and soft tissue transitions, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: fat rolls, folds, overhangs, cellulite-like surface variation, compression dents, sag contours, muscle definition, sharp cuts, and soft tissue transitions. Required output: surface feature maps.
requirements.title: Extract surface shape features

requirements.acceptance_criteria: texture_normal_displacement_feature_extractor is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, texture feature report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence texture_normal_displacement_feature_extractor. It must support normal, displacement, roughness, curvature, skin mark, pore, wrinkle, fold, and fabric tension cues, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: normal, displacement, roughness, curvature, skin mark, pore, wrinkle, fold, and fabric tension cues. Required output: texture feature report.
requirements.title: Extract texture normal displacement features

requirements.acceptance_criteria: character_registry_tag_verifier is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, tag verification report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence character_registry_tag_verifier. It must support user/asset tags such as skinny, athletic, very overweight, large abdomen, thick thighs, muscular, soft tissue, firm, or loose skin against geometry, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: user/asset tags such as skinny, athletic, very overweight, large abdomen, thick thighs, muscular, soft tissue, firm, or loose skin against geometry. Required output: tag verification report.
requirements.title: Verify character registry tags

requirements.acceptance_criteria: regional_tissue_classification_map is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, per-region tissue class map, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence regional_tissue_classification_map. It must support lean, muscular, dense soft tissue, soft fat, loose skin, fabric-covered, support-compressed, hard-protected, and mixed layered tissue classes, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: lean, muscular, dense soft tissue, soft fat, loose skin, fabric-covered, support-compressed, hard-protected, and mixed layered tissue classes. Required output: per-region tissue class map.
requirements.title: Classify regional tissue

requirements.acceptance_criteria: mass_density_parameter_map is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, mass density map, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence mass_density_parameter_map. It must support per-region mass/density for gravity, inertia, center of mass, support load, and contact behavior, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: per-region mass/density for gravity, inertia, center of mass, support load, and contact behavior. Required output: mass density map.
requirements.title: Infer mass density parameters

requirements.acceptance_criteria: stiffness_damping_parameter_map is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, stiffness damping map, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence stiffness_damping_parameter_map. It must support per-region stiffness and damping for firm muscle, soft tissue, loose skin, fabric-covered areas, and support compression, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: per-region stiffness and damping for firm muscle, soft tissue, loose skin, fabric-covered areas, and support compression. Required output: stiffness damping map.
requirements.title: Infer stiffness damping parameters

requirements.acceptance_criteria: elasticity_rebound_parameter_map is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, elasticity rebound map, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence elasticity_rebound_parameter_map. It must support bounce, rebound, settling, and return-to-rest behavior for soft and firm regions, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: bounce, rebound, settling, and return-to-rest behavior for soft and firm regions. Required output: elasticity rebound map.
requirements.title: Infer elasticity rebound parameters

requirements.acceptance_criteria: sag_jiggle_ripple_parameter_map is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, sag jiggle ripple map, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence sag_jiggle_ripple_parameter_map. It must support gravity sag, jiggle amount, ripple amount, temporal decay, and protected anchors, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: gravity sag, jiggle amount, ripple amount, temporal decay, and protected anchors. Required output: sag jiggle ripple map.
requirements.title: Infer sag jiggle ripple parameters

requirements.acceptance_criteria: compression_collision_parameter_map is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, compression collision map, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence compression_collision_parameter_map. It must support compression limits, contact deformation, collision backstops, penetration prevention, friction, and stiction, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: compression limits, contact deformation, collision backstops, penetration prevention, friction, and stiction. Required output: compression collision map.
requirements.title: Infer compression collision parameters

requirements.acceptance_criteria: skinny_body_profile_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, skinny profile evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence skinny_body_profile_solver. It must support low soft-tissue mass, low jiggle, sharper anchors, low compression, and careful bone/joint/face/hand protection, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: low soft-tissue mass, low jiggle, sharper anchors, low compression, and careful bone/joint/face/hand protection. Required output: skinny profile evidence.
requirements.title: Define skinny body profile solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: athletic_muscular_profile_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, athletic profile evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence athletic_muscular_profile_solver. It must support high firmness, low sag, low loose jiggle, strong muscle tension, sharper corrective shapes, and motion-linked flexion, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: high firmness, low sag, low loose jiggle, strong muscle tension, sharper corrective shapes, and motion-linked flexion. Required output: athletic profile evidence.
requirements.title: Define athletic muscular profile solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: fit_large_soft_region_profile_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, fit large soft-region profile evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence fit_large_soft_region_profile_solver. It must support firm torso/limbs with localized high-mass soft-body regions and protected muscular anchors, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: firm torso/limbs with localized high-mass soft-body regions and protected muscular anchors. Required output: fit large soft-region profile evidence.
requirements.title: Define fit body with large soft-region solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: mixed_layered_tissue_profile_solver is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, mixed tissue report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence mixed_layered_tissue_profile_solver. It must support regions where firmness and softness coexist, such as firm muscle under soft tissue or fabric-covered compression, operate after DAZ neutral prototype registration without human work, write exact blockers when prerequisites are unavailable, and avoid docs-only completion.
requirements.notes: Purpose: regions where firmness and softness coexist, such as firm muscle under soft tissue or fabric-covered compression. Required output: mixed tissue report.
requirements.title: Define mixed layered tissue solver

requirements.acceptance_criteria: inference_confidence_score is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, confidence report, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence inference_confidence_score. requirements.notes: Purpose: combine morph provenance, measurements, volume deltas, shape features, texture features, and registry tags into confidence. Required output: confidence report.
requirements.title: Score tissue inference confidence

requirements.acceptance_criteria: low_confidence_conservative_fallback is complete only when it has schema/config, adapter or deterministic implementation route, fallback blocker evidence, manifest hashes, preview or overlay evidence, strict whole-artifact review, and source-cited QA.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously define, execute when activated, validate, and evidence low_confidence_conservative_fallback. requirements.notes: Purpose: use conservative safe profiles and write blocker instead of guessing high-risk tissue behavior. Required output: fallback blocker evidence.

requirements.title: Review tissue inference overlays

title: Body Composition Tissue Material Inference Solver
